# `delivery-shipping` — delivery-shipping templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates impersonating package delivery and shipping companies

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DHL Package Delivery | [`dhl_package.html`](dhl_package.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 55-75% |
| Package Pickup Notice | [`package_pickup.html`](package_pickup.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 50-70% |

## Template details

### DHL Package Delivery

- **File:** [`dhl_package.html`](dhl_package.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 55-75%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/delivery_phishing_education.html`](education/delivery_phishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - DHL: Your shipment is on its way
  - Shipment notification: Package awaiting delivery confirmation
  - DHL Express: Delivery attempted — reschedule required
- **Operator notes:** Highest click-rate category. Nearly universal — works across all employee levels.

### Package Pickup Notice

- **File:** [`package_pickup.html`](package_pickup.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 50-70%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/delivery_phishing_education.html`](education/delivery_phishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Package ready for pickup — confirm your details
  - Delivery: Your package is waiting at the facility
  - Final notice: Package will be returned if not claimed
- **Operator notes:** A reliable beginner-level lure with broad appeal — nearly everyone is expecting a package. Click rates peak during holiday shopping seasons. Keep the sender generic, since most targets won't scrutinize which carrier it claims to be.

### Holiday Package Delivery Hold

- **File:** [`holiday_package_delivery.html`](holiday_package_delivery.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 55-75%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/delivery_phishing_education.html`](education/delivery_phishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Delivery Exception: Package held at distribution center due to unpaid customs fee
  - Shipment Notification: Address verification required for holiday delivery
  - Courier Alert: Action needed to deliver your holiday package
- **Operator notes:** Peak holiday shopping seasons (Q4) bring massive increases in home and office deliveries. Users are highly prone to clicking delivery alerts to ensure gifts arrive on time.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
